title: catalog audit cannot resolve captionless tables/figures in Serre
evidence: smoke H7 reports 22 unresolved visual semantics in parsed/_catalog_audit.md; offenders are captionless tables/figures inferred from surrounding prose (e.g. character tables, commutative-triangle diagram) and extract_rules.yaml has no per-item figure/table exclude or semantic-id controls
proposal: teach catalog/build step to classify captionless visual blocks from local context or allow reviewable per-book overrides for figure/table semantic id and exclusion metadata
